name: fable5-fusion
description: Multi-model fusion for Claude Code + Codex: a parallel panel (2x Claude Opus 4.8 + 1x GPT-5.5 via codex) answers a task independently and blind, then Opus 4.8 judges (Track A code: run both & merge / Track B research: structured synthesis) and a GPT-5.5 synthesizer writes one final answer grounded in the analysis.
